hero.title-3: your heart — directly to your phone.

copy.c-1: Short message, full of warmth and magic words.
copy.c-2: Every evening, at the same time.
copy.c-4: You can cancel at any time.

how-it-works.title: As simple as two sighs

step-1.title: Sign up in 30 seconds
step-1.description: Provide your phone number and done. Simple form that you will fill in less than 30 seconds.

step-2.title: Every evening at 20:59
step-2.description: You receive a message only for you. Every day, exactly at the same time.

step-3.title: Enjoy the moment
step-3.description: Read, smile, keep for yourself or send it to someone else. It's your moment of peace.

how-it-works.mini-CTA: So simple that you can have your first message today

reassurance-box.title: Your phone number is safe
reassurance-box.description: Free access for 7 days. You can cancel at any time.

smartphone-notification-section.title-1: Words that stay with you for
smartphone-notification-section.copy-1: These are not just random or AI-generated quotes. Each whisper is written manually by a poet who has been writing short forms full of emotions for years.
smartphone-notification-section.copy-2: They are like little love letters — only they fit in one SMS. Perfect to end the day with a smile.

testimonial-1.quote: These messages are little gems in my day. Sometimes a single sentence is enough to make me feel needed.
testimonial-1.author: Margaret

testimonial-2.quote: I open a text and suddenly the room feels brighter, even though the lights haven’t changed.
testimonial-2.author: Patricia

testimonial-3.quote: “Evening Whisper” is a daily letter from life — tender, light, essential.
testimonial-3.author: Eleanor

testimonial-4.quote: Every evening with “Evening Whisper” feels warmer. These short verses remind me that the heart can still tremble.
testimonial-4.author: Amelia

testimonial-5.quote: Thanks to them I feel once again like a young girl waiting for a letter from her beloved.
testimonial-5.author: Catherine

testimonial-6.quote: Your whispers are like a cup of tea by the fire — brief, but just right for the soul.
testimonial-6.author: Dorothy

testimonial-7.quote: These little texts, in just a few words, can awaken memories I haven’t visited in years.
testimonial-7.author: Anne

testimonial-8.quote: I never knew a text message could be like a touch — gentle, warm, soothing.
testimonial-8.author: Emily

pricing-section.title: A moment of warmth and kind words

bottom-cta.title: Ready for your first whisper?
bottom-cta.subtitle: Join thousands of readers who receive warm words every evening

next-message.title: Your next whisper
next-message.no-active-subscription: You don't have an active subscription

phone-number.max: Phone number must be less than 15 digits
phone-number.regex: Phone number can only contain digits, spaces, and hyphens

form-submit-message.phone: The verification code has been sent to your phone number.
form-submit-message.submit-error: An error occurred while sending the verification code.
form-submit-message.incorrect-code: Incorrect verification code. Please try again.
form-submit-message.code-verification-error: An error occurred while verifying the code.

phone-number.min: Phone number must be at least 6 digits
phone-number.max: Phone number must be less than 15 digits
phone-number.regex: Phone number can only contain digits, spaces, and hyphens

name.min: Name must be at least 2 characters
name.max: Name must be less than 50 characters
name.regex: Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes

form-validation-errors.form-submit: Please fix errors in the form.
form-validation-errors.form-submit-checkout-error: An error occurred while creating the checkout session.

ConfirmCodeViaEmail.title: Confirm your verification code
ConfirmCodeViaEmail.paragraph-1: Thank you for starting your registration with Evening Whisper. To confirm it’s really you, please enter the verification code below. If you are not creating an account, simply ignore this message.
ConfirmCodeViaEmail.verification-code-disclaimer: This code is valid for 2 minutes
ConfirmCodeViaEmail.disclaimer: Evening Whisper will never send emails asking you to disclose or verify your password, credit card, or bank account details.
ConfirmCodeViaEmail.footer: This message was automatically generated and sent by Evening Whisper.
